backend/main.mo: Motoko actor exposing four query functions (add, subtract, multiply, divide) for basic integer arithmetic, with divide returning a nullable result to handle division by zero.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping completed feature IDs (rebranding, auth pages, nav links, admin guard) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each modified or newly created frontend file as part of the Mahveer Finance rebranding and auth feature work.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including color, border, chart, and sidebar CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the browser tab title set to 'Mahveer Finance' and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with a shared Header/Footer layout and routes for home, calculators, apply, portal, admin, login, and register pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer branded as 'Mahveer Finance' with quick links, loan product list, and contact info; Caffeine.ai attribution has been removed.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header branded as 'Mahveer Finance' with desktop and mobile menus that include Login and Register links alongside the main nav items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Client-side authentication hook using localStorage/sessionStorage to manage user registration, login, and logout with a simple hash-based password scheme.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity (ICP) authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks and localStorage helpers for managing loan applications and bank interest rates, including EMI calculation and schedule generation utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind CSS and Google Fonts, defining CSS custom properties for a navy/gold design system with light and dark mode tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with passcode-protected login, allowing admins to view and update loan application statuses, mark EMI payments, and manage bank interest rates.
frontend/src/pages/ApplyPage.tsx: Loan application form page that collects applicant details, loan preferences, and an optional document upload, then submits the application and displays a confirmation with the generated application ID.
frontend/src/pages/CalculatorsPage.tsx: Provides tabbed financial calculator tools including an EMI calculator, bank rate comparison table, eligibility checker, and prepayment planner, all using slider-based inputs and live computed results.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPortalPage.ts: Customer-facing portal page that lets users look up their loan application status and EMI schedule by entering an application ID and phone number.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing Mahveer Finance's loan products, banking partners, differentiators, and financial tools with CTAs linking to the apply and calculator pages.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Admin/client login page with email, password, and remember-me fields that authenticates via the useAuth hook and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: User registration page with full name, email, phone, and password fields, performing client-side validation before calling the useAuth register function and redirecting to login.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold color palettes, display/mono font families, card/gold/navy box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the Mahveer Finance project state at version 3, documenting existing features (branding, auth flow, admin dashboard, login/register pages) and architectural notes about client-side localStorage-based authentication.
